# CWE-940 safe: state parameter validates callback origin
lang: go
file: CWE-940-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-940 mitigated: callback rejected when state cookie does not match request.

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

func OAuthCallbackVerified(db *sqlx.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		code := c.Query("code")
		state := c.Query("state")
		cookie, err := c.Cookie("oauth_state")
		if err != nil || cookie != state {
			c.JSON(http.StatusForbidden, gin.H{"error": "invalid oauth state"})
			return
		}
		userID := c.GetString("authenticated_user")
		_, err = db.Exec(
			"INSERT INTO oauth_tokens (user_id, code) VALUES ($1, $2)",
			userID, code,
		)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.Redirect(http.StatusFound, "/dashboard")
	}
}
